body.title: Read 6 known Kindle programming books: Documenting SW Arch, SW Systems Arch, Design Patterns (GoF), Design Patterns for Tests, Science of Selenium, 5 Steps AP CS
body.result: Queued 3 Calibre programming books into reading_list (encoding_arousal=0.80, priority=2): Documenting Software Architectures (RL_322), Software Systems Architecture (RL_323), Design Patterns GoF (RL_324). Design Patterns for Tests / Selenium / AP CS not found in Calibre or SORTUS — likely Kindle DRM AZW files without titles. Require DRM key extraction to access (T-kindle-drm-pipeline finding: NOKEY on Linux without Kindle app).
